core_principles: Clarity over Clutter: The product is 'transparency', so the design must feel open and breathable.
Data as Art: Technical specs are the hero content for B2B buyers. Display them beautifully.
Context is King: Show the screen IN ACTION (overlaying buildings), not just floating in void.
Trustworthy B2B: Clean lines, perfect alignment, no gimmicks.

highlight.description: Electric Cyan for subtle LED glow effects/active states only

usage_rules: Never use full-screen dark backgrounds (except footer).
Use 'highlight' color only for 1px borders or small glow effects.
Text should be 'primary' (slate-900) for headings, 'muted' (slate-600) for body.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.product: group relative bg-white border border-slate-100 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 p-8 border border-transparent hover:border-slate-200 transition-all

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on image backgrounds has a 'backdrop-blur' or 'bg-white/90' container for readability.
accessibility.aria: All product images must have descriptive alt text (e.g., 'Transparent LED screen on mall facade').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn components: Button, Card, Sheet (mobile menu), Table (for specs), Accordion (FAQs), Input, Textarea, Label.
2. Implement 'Lucide-React' icons for features (e.g., Sun for brightness, Eye for transparency).
3. Use the 'manrope' font from Google Fonts or similar.
4. Create a specific 'ProductDetail' component that accepts a specs object to render the table dynamically.
5. The Contact Form must include a 'WhatsApp' button action alongside the standard form submission.
6. Use the images provided in 'images_and_assets' for the respective sections.
7. Ensure the Navbar is sticky and has a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur).
8. DO NOT use dark mode. Force light mode in tailwind config or body class.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
